@everyone

Crew Packs Coming in Q2 - Platinum Presale Pack Now LIVE

Form your team with Crew Packs, your new crew with different art, names and aptitudes. Crew Cards serve as your in-game avatar, your ship's crew, crafting personnel, PFP and the essence of our mobile app releasing later this year.    

COMING Q2 2024

Get ready for Crew Packs early and pre-purchase a Platinum Presale 10 Card Pack now: https://play.staratlas.com/market/CRWPXjZw73dMW3pG7UMhVWDrfk5NnzMCMuWj6hVLMCYm/

Important: Starpath discounts do NOT work with this Presale Pack.

 | Learn more about pricing, probabilities, and what Crew Cards are: https://medium.com/star-atlas/a-new-release-on-the-horizon-star-atlas-crew-packs-coming-in-q2-2024-e2603415bc65
